daily_summary.headline: Exciting SpaceX Launch and Aurora Viewing Opportunities

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 rocket will launch the Starlink Group 10-48 mission, deploying 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch scheduled at 12:37 UTC.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected, providing a good chance to view auroras at latitudes down to 60°.
top_events.action: Check the skies between 18:00 and 21:00 UTC for potential aurora displays.

top_events.title: Long March 6A Launch
top_events.description: China's Long March 6A rocket will launch with an unknown payload.
top_events.action: Stay tuned for updates on this launch scheduled for 13:20 UTC.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
